---
id: calibrate-condition
title: "Generate calibration recommendation for a condition"
description: "Analyses stored feedback and/or a target alert volume to recommend adjusted parameters. Returns no_recommendation for equals strategy (no numeric parameter to adjust) or when no valid adjustment exists within declared threshold_bounds. Does NOT modify the existing condition — call apply-calibration to create a new version."
sidebar_label: "Generate calibration recommendation for a condition"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---
import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Generate calibration recommendation for a condition"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/conditions/calibrate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Analyses stored feedback and/or a target alert volume to recommend adjusted parameters. Returns no_recommendation for equals strategy (no numeric parameter to adjust) or when no valid adjustment exists within declared threshold_bounds. Does NOT modify the existing condition — call apply-calibration to create a new version.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
